title: Canonical Stage-1 scale and resume workflow
summary: Package the Concept configuration into a canonical large-scale Stage-1 launcher with full-state save/resume probes and independent training health monitoring.
hypothesis: A reproducible launcher, checkpoint policy and health signals are required before the architecture can be treated as a trainable model state.
design: Separate reusable model config from launch wrappers, define a 256-GPU Stage-1 entrypoint, add MFU/save-resume probes and capture route/VQ/rank/grad-update health independently of checkpoint cadence.

delta.summary: Package the Concept configuration into a canonical large-scale Stage-1 launcher with full-state save/resume probes and independent training health monitoring.

operations.before: ad-hoc public bench and A/B submission scripts
operations.after: canonical Stage-1 launcher sourcing one reusable Concept config
operations.rationale: Make the intended scale-up state explicit and reproducible.

operations.before: no dedicated full-state probe or Concept grad/update records
operations.after: full-state save/resume smoke plus route/VQ/rank/grad-update monitoring
operations.rationale: Detect inactive paths and verify recovery mechanics before long training.

commits.summary: Reusable config and thin compatibility launcher.

experiments.title: Short Concept training health smokes
experiments.summary: Committed report records successful short monitoring jobs with finite sampled gradients and updates; it is not a full Stage-1 completion.

experiments.title: Full Stage-1 training outcome
experiments.summary: The launcher and recovery workflow exist, but no complete training outcome is committed.

analysis.conclusion: Short operational smokes support the workflow, but full Stage-1 convergence and checkpoint content remain unresolved.
limitations: The recorded successful jobs are short monitoring/probe runs, not the complete 256-GPU Stage-1 run.
Checkpoint references are internal paths without content-addressed model hashes.

evidence.summary: Adds optimizer-step grad/update monitoring used by short successful smoke runs.
Adds a 256-GPU full-state save/resume smoke launcher.
Adds the canonical Concept OLMo Stage-1 launcher.
Separates reusable Concept configuration from compatibility and Stage-1 launchers.
Documents successful short monitoring jobs, finite sampled gradients/updates and an unrelated later CE OOM.

work-repo.note: Derived private work-repository evidence; never root or official OLMo-3 provenance.
